title: Crispy Roasted Potato Stir-fry
description: A spicy and comforting British dish featuring crispy roasted potatoes mixed with a spicy stir-fry sauce.
instructions: Slice potatoes into thin rounds. Toss with cornstarch, salt, pepper, garlic powder, and red pepper flakes.
Spread evenly on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper. Bake for about 15 minutes or until golden brown and crispy.
While the potatoes are roasting, prepare the stir-fry sauce by mixing soy sauce and oyster sauce in a small bowl.

Heat oil in a wok over medium-high heat. Add chopped onions and cook for about 2-3 minutes until translucent. Stir in prepared stir-fry sauce, bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and let simmer for another minute.
Add the crispy roasted potatoes to the wok along with any accumulated juices from the baking sheet. Toss well to coat evenly.
Serve hot as a side dish or over rice for an authentic British experience.
